notes: v0.16.55 — RIFT card animation in the PLAY hub is now NODE WEB (variant 4): a procedural rift run-map with 5 hex nodes connected by a dashed path. A SHARD ship hops node-to-node along the route, arcing slightly upward; each node it lands on lights up bright green and the path segment behind it fills in solid. Reads like the actual rift run flow — much clearer than the portal vortex placeholder. Windows only.
